warnings: Root wrapper mismatch warnings on TextCard, ImageCard, MasonryCards are pre-existing false positives from fragment-based TSX pattern — not regressions

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP both use $is_tall / masonryStyle && isTall as the gating condition. isTall attribute value is preserved in saved data; suppression is purely visual/UI.

testPage.notes: No attribute changes required — test page content remains valid. Existing variations already cover masonryStyle on/off scenarios.

fixesApplied.description: Gate isTall toolbar and sidebar controls behind masonryStyle; gate isTall visual classes behind masonryStyle && isTall
Introduce $is_tall = $masonry_style && $isTall; replace all $isTall class conditions with $is_tall
Gate isTall toolbar button and Card Settings panel behind masonryStyle; gate sm:min-h-[596px] behind masonryStyle && isTall
